name: dark-mode-toggle
trigger: button next to 'Get Started' in navbar (sun/moon icon, text 'Dark Mode' sr-only)
delta: Adds class 'dark' to <html> (removes 'light'). Body bg goes white -> rgb(23,23,23). All dark: tailwind variants activate (text colors, card bgs, borders). Icon swaps sun -> moon. Persisted to localStorage('theme'). Illustration SVG swaps a couple of fill colors (fill-current on shirt element).

name: mobile-menu-toggle
trigger: hamburger button aria-label='Toggle Menu', visible below 1024px (lg breakpoint)
delta: Toggles aria-expanded true/false on button. Reveals a headlessui Disclosure.Panel containing the nav links (Product/Features/Pricing/Company/Blog) stacked vertically + 'Get Started' button, pushed below the logo row. Icon swaps hamburger -> X. Panel is CSS transitioned (opacity/scale, duration ~150ms, ease-out) — implemented in source as @headlessui/react Transition with enter='transition duration-200 ease-out' enterFrom='opacity-0 -translate-y-1' enterTo='opacity-100 translate-y-0'.

name: faq-accordion
trigger: each FAQ question button (4 total, headlessui Disclosure)
delta: Clicking a question toggles aria-expanded on that button only (independent per-item, not single-open-accordion). Chevron icon rotates 180deg (rotate-180 class toggle) when open. Answer paragraph is revealed below the question row with a transition (opacity/height via headlessui Transition, duration ~150-200ms). Default state on page load (confirmed via raw page.html): all four buttons have aria-expanded="false" -- CLOSED by default, chevron pointing down; clicking opens/closes each independently.

name: contact-widget-open
trigger: floating circular button bottom-right, aria text 'Open Contact form Widget', fixed z-40 right-5 bottom-5
delta: Opens a fixed-position contact card anchored above the fab (bottom-right), with a purple header 'How can we help? / We usually respond in a few hours', fields Full Name / Email Address / Your Message, a 'Send Message' submit button, and 'Powered by Web3Forms' caption. The fab icon swaps from a chat-bubble glyph to an X close icon. Panel enters with a transition (fade + slide up, headlessui Transition, duration ~200ms ease-out).

name: play-video-click
trigger: large circular play button centered on the purple-gradient video placeholder card
delta: This is a decorative placeholder (no real <video> element/src in source) — clicking simply removes/hides the play button overlay (setState toggling a boolean that conditionally renders the button); the gradient card remains. No modal or actual video playback occurs.

name: nav-link-hover
trigger: each navbar link (Product, Features, Pricing, Company, Blog) and buttons (Nextly logo, Dark Mode toggle, Get Started, Download for Free)
delta: Text color transitions gray-800 -> indigo-500 on hover (hover:text-indigo-500), with focus ring variants. Buttons (Get Started, Download for Free) darken bg on hover (hover:bg-indigo-600). Captured per-element in el-N-rest.png / el-N-hover.png (see index.json for element->label mapping: 0=Nextly logo, 1=Dark Mode, 2=Get Started, 4-8=nav links, 9=Download for Free).

name: scroll-behavior
delta: No sticky/shrinking header, no scroll-triggered reveal animations or parallax detected in source CSS/JS (static Next.js/Tailwind marketing page, no GSAP/ScrollTrigger/Lenis present in fetched bundles; the only IntersectionObserver usage found is Next.js's built-in link-prefetch-on-viewport, unrelated to visual animation). Header is in normal flow (not position:sticky/fixed). Page is a plain scroll.
